title: 1.1: Renames the wrapped field in parsingState struct in js/compiler/compiler.go to indicate CommonJS module wrapping
1.2: Renames the wrap parameter in Parse function in js/compiler/compiler.go to indicate CommonJS module wrapping
1.3: Renames the wrap parameter in parseImpl function in js/compiler/compiler.go to indicate CommonJS module wrapping
1.4: Removes the unused Strict field from the Options struct in js/compiler/compiler.go
1.5: Removes the Strict field usage from compiler Options instantiation in js/bundle.go
1.6: Renames the sourceMapURLFromBabel constant in js/compiler/compiler.go to remove the Babel reference
1.7: Removes the Babel reference from user-facing compatibility mode help text in cmd/runtime_options.go
1.8: Removes both Babel references from the package documentation in js/compiler/compiler.go (package doc comment, sourceMapLoader comment)
1.9: Removes both Babel references from compatibility mode comments in lib/runtime_options.go (CompatibilityModeExtended comment, RuntimeOptions CompatibilityMode comment)
1.10: Removes both Babel references from js/tc39/README.md ("Sobek+babel" in introduction, "k6 add babel to the mix" in last paragraph)
3.1: Removes the redundant logger field from parsingState struct in js/compiler/compiler.go
4.1: Deletes the Parse function from js/compiler/compiler.go entirely
4.2: Deletes the sourceMapLoader method from js/compiler/compiler.go entirely
4.3: Deletes the wrap method from js/compiler/compiler.go entirely
